description_for_human: Logiciel de gestion pour hostels et auberges au Maroc. Check-in digital, fiches de police, WhatsApp, paiements MAD.
description_for_model: Sweet Reservation is a hostel property management system for Morocco. It handles guest check-in (60 seconds), automatic police registration form (fiche de police) PDF generation, bed map management, WhatsApp messaging, MAD payments, and revenue reporting. Primarily French-language, also supports Arabic and English.
